intro: Minuartia ophiolitica, also known as the serpent's bell, is a flowering plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, diabetes, and cardiovascular diseases. The bioactive constituents of Minuartia ophiolitica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
